entry.title: [EAST] IN SESSION #31: Everyone loves Khorramshahr with Sina Rahmani
entry.summary:
I thought it was time to bring Sina from behind the scenes, to the limelight. Can you believe this is his first solo appearance on Psychic Militancy? This episode’s graphic is Sina’s brainchild, which should already tell you everything you need to know and have to look forward to for this episode. All things Iran, anti-imperialism, and empire’s decay on full sight.
Sina Rahmani is a producer extraordinaire and the mastermind behind a growing Tankieverse of spinoffs, including the very popular Everybody (still) loves Nora, AKA, TGT the musical. When he’s not suffering over bad lighting, a bad angle, or a horrible mic, he’s planting peas and planning for world domination through greenhouse farming. He frequently threatens to shut down the Strait of Hormuz as disciplinary tactic against his podcast talking heads. (Written by me since he stopped responding and I needed a bio)
Don’t forget to click subscribe to our YouTube channel! And for prereleases and a bunch of other fun shit, consider becoming a paying member at our Patreon at www.patreon.com/psyschicmilitancy
Find us on IG: @psychicmilitancypod
entry.content:
I thought it was time to bring Sina from behind the scenes, to the limelight. Can you believe this is his first solo appearance on Psychic Militancy? This episode’s graphic is Sina’s brainchild, which should already tell you everything you need to know and have to look forward to for this episode. All things Iran, anti-imperialism, and empire’s decay on full sight.

Sina Rahmani is a producer extraordinaire and the mastermind behind a growing Tankieverse of spinoffs, including the very popular Everybody (still) loves Nora, AKA, TGT the musical. When he’s not suffering over bad lighting, a bad angle, or a horrible mic, he’s planting peas and planning for world domination through greenhouse farming. He frequently threatens to shut down the Strait of Hormuz as disciplinary tactic against his podcast talking heads. (Written by me since he stopped responding and I needed a bio)

Don’t forget to click subscribe to our YouTube channel! And for prereleases and a bunch of other fun shit, consider becoming a paying member at our Patreon at www.patreon.com/psyschicmilitancy

Find us on IG: @psychicmilitancypod

entry.title: [EAST] IN SESSION #28: Disrupting normalization in Palestine & Lebanon with Abdaljawad Omar
entry.summary:
This collaboration with my dear comrade Abboud has been a long time coming—and I’m so excited for you all to join us. You likely already know Abboud from his frequent appearances with our comrades at MAKC; I always look to him for some of the most meticulous analysis we have from the Arab world, and especially our region. We have a lot to get into since the last time we were together on screen, so make sure you tune in!!
Abdaljawad Omar is a Palestinian writer and Assistant Professor at Birzeit University. His work focuses on anti-colonial resistance and the modes of refusal that Palestinians have managed to create and sustain. He has two forthcoming books: Can the Palestinian Mourn? (Seagull Books, Spring 2027) and Tufan: Palestinian Resistance as Thought and Practice (Pluto Press, 2027).
Make sure to subscribe to our YouTube channel and for exclusive prereleases, consider becoming a member at our Patreon.
You can also find us on IG: @psychicmilitancypod
entry.content:
This collaboration with my dear comrade Abboud has been a long time coming—and I’m so excited for you all to join us. You likely already know Abboud from his frequent appearances with our comrades at MAKC; I always look to him for some of the most meticulous analysis we have from the Arab world, and especially our region. We have a lot to get into since the last time we were together on screen, so make sure you tune in!!

Abdaljawad Omar is a Palestinian writer and Assistant Professor at Birzeit University. His work focuses on anti-colonial resistance and the modes of refusal that Palestinians have managed to create and sustain. He has two forthcoming books: Can the Palestinian Mourn? (Seagull Books, Spring 2027) and Tufan: Palestinian Resistance as Thought and Practice (Pluto Press, 2027).

Make sure to subscribe to our YouTube channel and for exclusive prereleases, consider becoming a member at our Patreon.

You can also find us on IG: @psychicmilitancypod

entry.title: [EAST] MAGA WC LIVESTREAM: ADNAN HUSAIN

Adnan's show: https://www.youtube.com/@adnanhusainshow ________________________________________ Support & Follow The End of Sport Patreon: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠patreon.com/Theendofsport⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ (Support the show!) Bluesky: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠@endofsportpod.bsky.social⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ Instagram: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠@endofsportpod⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ Twitter/X: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠@EndofSportPod⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ YouTube: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠The End of Sport⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ Listen, share, and support The End of Sport, a proud member of the Harbinger Media Network, a community of over sixty leftist podcasts at ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠harbingermedianetwork.com⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠.

entry.title: [EAST] World Cup 2026: Geopolitics and the Beautiful Game
entry.summary:
This Guerrilla History series previewing and analyzing the major international football (soccer) tournaments on and off the pitch continues with the disastrous US/Canada/Mexico hosted World Cup 2026. Amid war on Iran, anti-immigrant ICE terror gangs, dismal initial attendance numbers and astronomical costs, this world cup looks to be one of the worst in history. No wonder there have been calls to boycott it and the US. A terrific global panel joins Guerrilla History hosts Adnan and Henry to discuss the geopolitics of the once beautiful game and review the myriad ways this world cup violates the spirit of sport. Gazan journalist Abubaker Abed , Resistance is Fertile podcast co-host Indi.ca, and returning panelist and great friend of both Guerrilla History and the Adnan Husain Show Latin American historian Alex Aviña will break this down. Join us live Tuesday June 9th, 2pmET/7pmDublin/9pmKazan/12amColombo.
Give to Dahnoun Mutual Aid in Gaza: https://www.instagram.com/dahnounmutualaid/
Subscribe to Guerrilla History podcast on your favorite audio podcast platform or listen at: https://guerrillahistory.libsyn.com
Follow Abubaker Abed on X and substack: x.com/AbubakerAbedW and substack.com/@AbubakerAbedW
Follow Indi on X and his website: x.com/indica and https://indi.ca as well as Resistance is Fertile podcast on his YT channel: @indications
Follow Alex on X: x.com/Alexander_Avina
Support this show on Patreon or Substack, if you can (and get early access to episodes)! www.patreon.com/adnanhusain https://www.adnanahusain.substack.com Or make a one-time donation to the show and Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/adnanhusain Like, subscribe, share! Also available as audio podcast on all major platforms: https://adnanhusainshow.libsyn.com X: @adnanahusain Substack: adnanahusain.substack.com www.adnanhusain.org
🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5595083013226496
entry.content:
This Guerrilla History series previewing and analyzing the major international football (soccer) tournaments on and off the pitch continues with the disastrous US/Canada/Mexico hosted World Cup 2026. Amid war on Iran, anti-immigrant ICE terror gangs, dismal initial attendance numbers and astronomical costs, this world cup looks to be one of the worst in history. No wonder there have been calls to boycott it and the US. A terrific global panel joins Guerrilla History hosts Adnan and Henry to discuss the geopolitics of the once beautiful game and review the myriad ways this world cup violates the spirit of sport. Gazan journalist Abubaker Abed , Resistance is Fertile podcast co-host Indi.ca, and returning panelist and great friend of both Guerrilla History and the Adnan Husain Show Latin American historian Alex Aviña will break this down. Join us live Tuesday June 9th, 2pmET/7pmDublin/9pmKazan/12amColombo.

Give to Dahnoun Mutual Aid in Gaza: https://www.instagram.com/dahnounmutualaid/

Subscribe to Guerrilla History podcast on your favorite audio podcast platform or listen at: https://guerrillahistory.libsyn.com

Follow Abubaker Abed on X and substack: x.com/AbubakerAbedW and substack.com/@AbubakerAbedW

Follow Indi on X and his website: x.com/indica and https://indi.ca as well as Resistance is Fertile podcast on his YT channel: @indications

Follow Alex on X: x.com/Alexander_Avina

Support this show on Patreon or Substack, if you can (and get early access to episodes)!
www.patreon.com/adnanhusain
https://www.adnanahusain.substack.com
Or make a one-time donation to the show and Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/adnanhusain
Like, subscribe, share!
Also available as audio podcast on all major platforms:
https://adnanhusainshow.libsyn.com
X: @adnanahusain
Substack: adnanahusain.substack.com
www.adnanhusain.org

🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5595083013226496

entry.title: [EAST] LIVESTREAM - (How badly) Did the US lose to Iran? w/Sina Rahmani ( 4pm EST/3pm CT/2pm MST/1pm PST)
entry.summary:
Join TRN podcast host Nick Estes live in conversation with Sina Rahmani, producer of The Red Nation Podcast and host of The East is a Podcast, discussing not only the historic failure of the ZioAmerican imperialist war machine to achieve their stated war aims of toppling Iran's government, but also Iran's equally historic upending of the American siege around the country through so-called "sanctions."
We look forward to your questions and comments. As always, Red Media patrons get priority access for questions/comments, so make sure you sign up at Patreon.com/redmediapr
entry.content:
Join TRN podcast host Nick Estes live in conversation with Sina Rahmani, producer of The Red Nation Podcast and host of The East is a Podcast, discussing not only the historic failure of the ZioAmerican imperialist war machine to achieve their stated war aims of toppling Iran's government, but also Iran's equally historic upending of the American siege around the country through so-called "sanctions."

We look forward to your questions and comments. As always, Red Media patrons get priority access for questions/comments, so make sure you sign up at Patreon.com/redmediapr

entry.title: [EAST] Iran vs. the Epstein Empire 17 w/RIF, Sina Rahmani and Mikey
entry.summary:
"Have the tables turned" is the 17th installment of this collaborative livestream series Iran vs. the Epstein Empire or the Axis of Resistance vs. the Axis of Epstein. As ever, co-hosts of Resistance is Fertile Podcast, Benji and Indi, will be there, but Adnan will be asleep on his travels East (but return next week!), so two special guests return to the panel, Sina Rahmani of East is a Podcast and Mikey. The crew discusses the latest developments of the Ramadan hot and cold War, the geopolitics and economics of war and "ceasefire" negotiations. Join with your questions and comments. This is your haven for anti-imperialist analysis, solidarity and community.
Follow Resistance is Fertile podcast: resistanceisfertilepodcast.substack.com and on YT @indications
Follow East is a Podcast on YT: @theeastisapodcast
Like, share, subscribe to all three channels!
Support the show on Patreon or Substack, if you can (and get early access to episodes)! www.patreon.com/adnanhusain https://www.adnanahusain.substack.com Or make a one-time donation to the show and Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/adnanhusain Like, subscribe, share! Also available as audio podcast on all major platforms: https://adnanhusainshow.libsyn.com X: @adnanahusain Substack: adnanahusain.substack.com www.adnanhusain.org
🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5595083013226496

entry.title: [EAST] Iran vs. the Epstein Empire 16 w/RIF, Sina Rahmani and Navid Farnia
entry.summary:
*** Please consider supporting Ameer https://chuffed.org/project/176452-help-ameer-live
****
"Iran Breaks the Siege" is the 16th installment of this collaborative livestream series Iran vs. the Epstein Empire or the Axis of Resistance vs. the Axis of Epstein. As ever, co-hosts of Resistance is Fertile Podcast, Benji and Indi, will be there, but Adnan will be asleep on his travels East (but return next week!), so two special guests return to the panel, Sina Rahmani of East is a Podcast and Prof. Navid Farnia. The crew discusses the latest developments of the Ramadan hot and cold War, the geopolitics and economics of war and "ceasefire" negotiations. Join with your questions and comments. entry.title: [EAST] Inside the Podcaster's Studio w/ Sina Rahmani
entry.summary:
In this episode, East is a Podcast and Millennials Are Killing Capitalism will co-stream to discuss the world of podcasting. How we do our work, what our struggles are, what our gripes are, and perhaps, what is to be done?
Please give to Mohammed and his family https://chuffed.org/project/168100-mohammed-and-siblings-need-our-help
To support MAKC https://www.patreon.com/millennialsarekillingcapitalism To support The East is a Podcast: https://www.patreon.com/east_podcast
🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5918500207853568

entry.title: [EAST] The War on Mali: Colonialism to Imperialism
entry.summary:
Join us for another livestream
AISC members Aby Sene and Navid Farnia will discuss the imperialist attacks on Mali and examine the role of France and the United States in sowing instability in the Sahel region.
Follow AISC
X (@penandmachete) Instagram (@penandmachete)
Visit our website to join the newsletter and find our blog, The Pen is My Machete. https://www.anti-imperialists.com/
Donations to the producer of this show, Sina Rahmani, are welcome at www.patreon.com/east_podcast
entry.content:
Join us for another livestream

AISC members Aby Sene and Navid Farnia will discuss the imperialist attacks on Mali and examine the role of France and the United States in sowing instability in the Sahel region.


Follow AISC

X (@penandmachete)
Instagram (@penandmachete)

Visit our website to join the newsletter and find our blog, The Pen is My Machete.
https://www.anti-imperialists.com/

Donations to the producer of this show, Sina Rahmani, are welcome at www.patreon.com/east_podcast

entry.title: [EAST] LIVESTREAM: Imperialsm is the primary contradiction (FRIDAY 3 pm est)
entry.summary: On this May Day livestream, AISC members Peter Hudson, Corinna Mullin and Jemima Pierre will be joined by Brahim Rouabah to discuss why imperialism is still the primary contradiction and has been for centuries. We will tackle the latest news in the war on West Asia and the capitalism v. white supremacy debates that raged on social media. The show will be hosted by Nina Farnia, with Corinna Mullin reporting live from New York City's May Day march.
entry.content: On this May Day livestream, AISC members Peter Hudson, Corinna Mullin and Jemima Pierre will be joined by Brahim Rouabah to discuss why imperialism is still the primary contradiction and has been for centuries. We will tackle the latest news in the war on West Asia and the capitalism v. white supremacy debates that raged on social media. The show will be hosted by Nina Farnia, with Corinna Mullin reporting live from New York City's May Day march.

entry.title: [EAST] Iran vs. the Epstein Empire 14 w/RIF and Sina Rahmani
entry.summary:
"Empire of Death vs Axis of Dignity" is episode 14 of the Iran vs. the Epstein Empire series, a collaboration with Resistance is Fertile Podcast and its co-hosts Benji Schoendorff and Indi.ca. We also welcome producer Sina Rahmani of East is a Podcast and the impressario of the anti-imperialist left podcastosphere. We come together to continue to update and analyze the Ramadan War, all the fronts of the Axis of Resistance and to pillory the Empire and puncture its disinformation/propaganda campaigns. This is your haven for anti-imperialist analysis, community and solidarity, so join us with your questions and comments Thursday, April 30th at 9pmET.
Follow Resistance is Fertile Podcast: resistanceisfertilepodcast.substack.com
Follow Sina on The East is a Podcast: https://youtube.com/@theeastisapodcast
Support the show on Patreon or Substack, if you can (and get early access to episodes)! www.patreon.com/adnanhusain https://www.adnanahusain.substack.com Or make a one-time donation to the show and Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/adnanhusain Like, subscribe, share! Also available as audio podcast on all major platforms: https://adnanhusainshow.libsyn.com X: @adnanahusain Substack: adnanahusain.substack.com www.adnanhusain.org
🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5595083013226496
entry.content:
"Empire of Death vs Axis of Dignity" is episode 14 of the Iran vs. the Epstein Empire series, a collaboration with Resistance is Fertile Podcast and its co-hosts Benji Schoendorff and Indi.ca. We also welcome producer Sina Rahmani of East is a Podcast and the impressario of the anti-imperialist left podcastosphere. We come together to continue to update and analyze the Ramadan War, all the fronts of the Axis of Resistance and to pillory the Empire and puncture its disinformation/propaganda campaigns. This is your haven for anti-imperialist analysis, community and solidarity, so join us with your questions and comments Thursday, April 30th at 9pmET.

entry.title: [EAST] Tankie Group Therapy #38 - F*ck it, we'll do it live!
entry.summary:
Tankie Group Therapy is back! Sina, Jay, Lara, Adnan, Mikey, and Nora join the episode for a long debrief, and joining us for the first time is longtime friend of the show, Ali Alizadeh!
Some of the campaigns mentioned in the episode
https://chuffed.org/project/168100-mohammed-and-siblings-need-our-help
https://chuffed.org/project/174168-support-a-third-round-of-spocs-for-gaza
Watch the livestream edition on our YouTube channel
Consider supporting the show www.patreon.com/east_podcast
entry.content:
Tankie Group Therapy is back! Sina, Jay, Lara, Adnan, Mikey, and Nora join the episode for a long debrief, and joining us for the first time is longtime friend of the show, Ali Alizadeh!

Some of the campaigns mentioned in the episode

https://chuffed.org/project/168100-mohammed-and-siblings-need-our-help 

https://chuffed.org/project/174168-support-a-third-round-of-spocs-for-gaza


Watch the livestream edition on our YouTube channel

Consider supporting the show
www.patreon.com/east_podcast

entry.title: [EAST] Iran vs. Epstein Empire (Day 42)
entry.summary:
Jay from Millennials are Killing Capitalism @MAKCapitalism (and maybe some other surprise guests?) will be joining me to talk about the latest developments from the war.
We look forward to your comments and questions!
entry.content:
Jay from Millennials are Killing Capitalism @MAKCapitalism (and maybe some other surprise guests?) will be joining me to talk about the latest developments from the war.

We look forward to your comments and questions!

entry.title: [EAST] IN SESSION #13: Empire's problem with sovereignty with Helyeh Doutaghi, Bikrum Gill & Alex Aviña
entry.summary:
Between the so-called Middle-East and Latin America, oh my, we have a lot to talk about how this empire implodes, psychically and otherwise, in the face of sovereign nations refusing to bend to its violence. Who better to help us unpack this than three of the most fierce anti-imperialist comrades I know--all of whom have a lot to say about sovereignty, empire, and, importantly, resistance.
Helyeh Doutaghi is scholar of international law and geopolitical economy. Her research explores the intersections of the Third World Approaches to International Law (TWAIL), encompassing postcolonial critiques of law, sanctions, and international political economy. Dr. Doutaghi’s research draws on the mechanisms, harms, and beneficiaries of the sanctions regime imposed on Iran, centering questions of value transfer and wealth drain. Additionally, she is interested in International Humanitarian Law (IHL), having written about its history, practice, and the production of knowledge (and ignorance), particularly in the context of the US military. She was expelled from Yale Law School and the LPE project for speaking up for Palestinian liberation last year. She is currently a post-doctoral fellow at the University of Tehran, where she will focus on completing her manuscript on the Iranian sanctions regime and neoliberalism.
Bikrum Gill is a scholar of international political economy, and author of "The Political Ecology of Colonial Capitalism: Race, Nature, and Accumulation", published by Manchester University Press.
Alex Aviña is an Associate Professor of History at Arizona State University. He is a historian of Mexico and Latin America.
entry.content:
Between the so-called Middle-East and Latin America, oh my, we have a lot to talk about how this empire implodes, psychically and otherwise, in the face of sovereign nations refusing to bend to its violence. Who better to help us unpack this than three of the most fierce anti-imperialist comrades I know--all of whom have a lot to say about sovereignty, empire, and, importantly, resistance.

Helyeh Doutaghi is scholar of international law and geopolitical economy. Her research explores the intersections of the Third World Approaches to International Law (TWAIL), encompassing postcolonial critiques of law, sanctions, and international political economy. Dr. Doutaghi’s research draws on the mechanisms, harms, and beneficiaries of the sanctions regime imposed on Iran, centering questions of value transfer and wealth drain. Additionally, she is interested in International Humanitarian Law (IHL), having written about its history, practice, and the production of knowledge (and ignorance), particularly in the context of the US military. She was expelled from Yale Law School and the LPE project for speaking up for Palestinian liberation last year. She is currently a post-doctoral fellow at the University of Tehran, where she will focus on completing her manuscript on the Iranian sanctions regime and neoliberalism.

Bikrum Gill is a scholar of international political economy, and author of "The Political Ecology of Colonial Capitalism: Race, Nature, and Accumulation", published by Manchester University Press.

Alex Aviña is an Associate Professor of History at Arizona State University. He is a historian of Mexico and Latin America.

entry.title: [EAST] Office Hours 28-Unity in Struggle against Empire w/Sina Rahmani
entry.summary:
Office Hours returns and the radical academy is open! Fri March 27 4pmET, Sina Rahmani, host of East is a Podcast and producer of the Adnan Husain Show joins to talk about the larger context of empire and imperialism at this moment. We'll take up the questions like what is empire and imperialism, its history and contemporary operation? How do we as the "left" in the "imperial core" fit into it and the question of solidarity and its barriers for internationalist worker/peoples' resistance? What is the place of Islamophobia in empire? What resources do the "Islamic resistance" in Palestine and across West Asia derive from its traditions? How do we decolonize the spirit and the material realities we live in? What role does the diaspora have in the Empire? We are told to listen to "Iranian voices" and "Syrian voices" even when their critiques undermine sovereignty and prepare for imperial wars--how do we navigate these questions?
Join us!
Follow Sina's channel East is a Podcast: youtube.com/@theeastisapodcast
Please consider help Mohammed and his siblings here: https://chuffed.org/project/168100-mohammed-and-siblings-need-our-help
Support the show on Patreon or Substack, if you can (and get early access to episodes)!
www.patreon.com/adnanhusain
https://www.adnanahusain.substack.com
Or make a one-time donation to the show and
Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/adnanhusain
Like, subscribe, share! Also available as audio podcast on all major platforms: https://adnanhusainshow.libsyn.com X: @adnanahusain Substack: adnanahusain.substack.com www.adnanhusain.org
🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5595083013226496
entry.content:
Office Hours returns and the radical academy is open! Fri March 27 4pmET, Sina Rahmani, host of East is a Podcast and producer of the Adnan Husain Show joins to talk about the larger context of empire and imperialism at this moment. We'll take up the questions like what is empire and imperialism, its history and contemporary operation? How do we as the "left" in the "imperial core" fit into it and the question of solidarity and its barriers for internationalist worker/peoples' resistance? What is the place of Islamophobia in empire? What resources do the "Islamic resistance" in Palestine and across West Asia derive from its traditions? How do we decolonize the spirit and the material realities we live in? What role does the diaspora have in the Empire? We are told to listen to "Iranian voices" and "Syrian voices" even when their critiques undermine sovereignty and prepare for imperial wars--how do we navigate these questions?

Join us!

Follow Sina's channel East is a Podcast: youtube.com/@theeastisapodcast

entry.title: [EAST] Colonial Psyops with Lara Sheehi in conversation with Nick Estes
entry.summary:
In this special episode Lara Sheehi will return to the platform for a conversation co-hosted by Nick Estes, and co-streamed on The Red Nation podcast. We will talk about some elements of her new book From the Clinic to the Streets: Psychoanalysis for Revolutionary Futures. And specifically we will dig into some of the work she does in the book discussing the history of the development of the fields of Psychological Operations and Psychological Warfare and how those fields were shaped by psychoanalysis in the 20th Century. We will get into the current implications for “domestic counterinsurgency,” colonialism, and imperialism, including in the settler colonial contexts on Turtle Island and Occupied Palestine. Pre-order a copy of From the Clinic to the Streets: Psychoanalysis for Revolutionary Futures.
Lara Sheehi is a Research Fellow at the University of South Africa’s Institute for Social and Health Sciences, a licensed clinical psychologist, and the host of the Psychic Militancy podcast. Lara’s work focuses on psychoanalysis, the psychic refusals central to liberation struggles and life-making in the Global South, the psychic dimensions of resistance and revolution, and critical Zionism studies. She is co-author with Stephen Sheehi of Psychoanalysis Under Occupation: Practicing Resistance in Palestine which won the Middle East Monitor’s 2022 Palestine Book Award for Best Academic Book. Lara is a member of the founding collective for the Institute for the Critical Study of Zionism and is on the advisory board for Forensic Architecture.
Make sure you are subscribed and support the Psychic Militancy podcast and The Red Nation podcast and Red Media.
entry.content:
In this special episode Lara Sheehi will return to the platform for a conversation co-hosted by Nick Estes, and co-streamed on The Red Nation podcast. We will talk about some elements of her new book From the Clinic to the Streets: Psychoanalysis for Revolutionary Futures. And specifically we will dig into some of the work she does in the book discussing the history of the development of the fields of Psychological Operations and Psychological Warfare and how those fields were shaped by psychoanalysis in the 20th Century. We will get into the current implications for “domestic counterinsurgency,” colonialism, and imperialism, including in the settler colonial contexts on Turtle Island and Occupied Palestine. Pre-order a copy of From the Clinic to the Streets: Psychoanalysis for Revolutionary Futures.

Lara Sheehi is a Research Fellow at the University of South Africa’s Institute for Social and Health Sciences, a licensed clinical psychologist, and the host of the Psychic Militancy podcast. Lara’s work focuses on psychoanalysis, the psychic refusals central to liberation struggles and life-making in the Global South, the psychic dimensions of resistance and revolution, and critical Zionism studies. She is co-author with Stephen Sheehi of Psychoanalysis Under Occupation: Practicing Resistance in Palestine which won the Middle East Monitor’s 2022 Palestine Book Award for Best Academic Book. Lara is a member of the founding collective for the Institute for the Critical Study of Zionism and is on the advisory board for Forensic Architecture.

Make sure you are subscribed and support the Psychic Militancy podcast and The Red Nation podcast and Red Media.

entry.title: [EAST] A Call for Revolutionary Intellectual Alignment w/Dr. Ghassan Abu Sittah
entry.summary:
This livestream collaboration with Lara Sheehi and Psychic Militancy discusses an important document "Toward a Revolutionary Charter for Comprehensive Liberation" released recently that takes an adamant and uncompromising critique of contemporary Arab intelligentsias and calls for a radical realignment against colonial knowledges and with the masses. This is a critical juncture in West Asia; the convulsions of the Gaza genocide, the war on Iran, and the reshaping of its political boundaries, economies and societies in violent colonial war and resistance demand that all social groupings and classes address themselves to revolutionary anticolonial struggle.
Lara and I speak with one of the authors of this radical manifesto, Dr. Ghassan Abu Sittah, the famous Palestinian surgeon, academic, activist, and Rector of Glasgow University in Scotland. We'll take up the questions of why "pessimism of the intellect" has not been accompanied by "optimist of the will" among the intellectual classes, the manifestations of "defeatist" and comprador thought, and how to revive the courageous role of intellectuals organically in the people's struggle as a resource for liberation. Centered on the question of Palestine but addressed to the wider Arab peoples confronting Zionism, colonialism, and imperialism, the conversation will explore the document's six key principles and concepts like rooted knowledge, intellectual sovereignty, democratizing knowledge and how ideology can be turned into a material force for liberation.
This will be a fascinating discussion! Join us.
You can read a translation of the document here: https://en.al-akhbar.com/news/toward-a-revolutionary-charter-for-comprehensive-liberation1
Follow Dr. Ghassan Abu Sittah on X: https://x.com/GhassanAbuSitt1
Subscribe to Psychic Militancy: https://www.youtube.com/@PsychicMilitancy
Support the Sameer Project's Ramadan Campaign: https://chuffed.org/project/166623-sameer-project-x-ramadan-campaign
Support this show on Patreon or Substack, if you can (and get early access to episodes)! www.patreon.com/adnanhusain https://www.adnanahusain.substack.com Or make a one-time donation to the show and Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/adnanhusain Like, subscribe, share! Also available as audio podcast on all major platforms: https://adnanhusainshow.libsyn.com X: @adnanahusain Substack: adnanahusain.substack.com www.adnanhusain.org
🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5595083013226496

This livestream collaboration with Lara Sheehi and Psychic Militancy discusses an important document "Toward a Revolutionary Charter for Comprehensive Liberation" released recently that takes an adamant and uncompromising critique of contemporary Arab intelligentsias and calls for a radical realignment against colonial knowledges and with the masses. This is a critical juncture in West Asia; the convulsions of the Gaza genocide, the war on Iran, and the reshaping of its political boundaries, economies and societies in violent colonial war and resistance demand that all social groupings and classes address themselves to revolutionary anticolonial struggle.

Lara and I speak with one of the authors of this radical manifesto, Dr. Ghassan Abu Sittah, the famous Palestinian surgeon, academic, activist, and Rector of Glasgow University in Scotland. We'll take up the questions of why "pessimism of the intellect" has not been accompanied by "optimist of the will" among the intellectual classes, the manifestations of "defeatist" and comprador thought, and how to revive the courageous role of intellectuals organically in the people's struggle as a resource for liberation. Centered on the question of Palestine but addressed to the wider Arab peoples confronting Zionism, colonialism, and imperialism, the conversation will explore the document's six key principles and concepts like rooted knowledge, intellectual sovereignty, democratizing knowledge and how ideology can be turned into a material force for liberation.

This will be a fascinating discussion! Join us.

entry.title: [EAST] LIVE NOW - Iran Vs. The Declining Kayfabe Empire featuring Sina Rahmani & Kumars Salehi
entry.summary:
In this episode Sina Rahmani from The East is a Podcast & Kumars Salehi from Delete Your Account will join us to talk about the wrestling term "kayfabe" which is about maintaining the illusions that staged storylines and pre-determined matches are authentic, and that wrestlers are actually the characters they portray. We'll talk about this idea in relation to how the US Empire projects itself globally, and particularly in light of massive setbacks being faced by Israel & the US in their war on Iran and the Arab-Iranian region.
🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5918500207853568
entry.content:
In this episode Sina Rahmani from The East is a Podcast & Kumars Salehi from Delete Your Account will join us to talk about the wrestling term "kayfabe" which is about maintaining the illusions that staged storylines and pre-determined matches are authentic, and that wrestlers are actually the characters they portray. We'll talk about this idea in relation to how the US Empire projects itself globally, and particularly in light of massive setbacks being faced by Israel & the US in their war on Iran and the Arab-Iranian region.

🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5918500207853568

entry.title: [EAST] Iran vs. Epstein Empire 4 w/RIF and David Yaghoubian
entry.summary:
"Endgame: Tehran or al-Quds" is eps 4 of the series Iran vs. the Epstein Empire. Livestreaming 8pmET/5pmPT. As the "Ramadan War" is a regional one w/ new support fronts open in Iraq and Lebanon, we might have to expand this to Axis of Resistance vs. the Epstein Empire. The crew of Indi, Benji, Dave and I will analyze the latest political, economic, diplomatic, and military developments up to Day 9 across the theatres of war and globally. Join us with your questions, comments, and suggested topics. This is the place to convene for support, education, and encouragement to anti-imperialist action against this criminal war. Free Palestine!
Follow Resistance is Fertile: resistanceisfertilepodcast.substack.com
Give to the Sameer Project's Ramadan Campaign: https://chuffed.org/project/166623-sameer-project-x-ramadan-campaign
Support the show on Patreon or Substack, if you can (and get early access to many episodes)! www.patreon.com/adnanhusain https://www.adnanahusain.substack.com Or make a one-time donation to the show and Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/adnanhusain Like, subscribe, share! Also available as audio podcast on all major platforms: https://adnanhusainshow.libsyn.com X: @adnanahusain Substack: adnanahusain.substack.com www.adnanhusain.org
🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5595083013226496

entry.title: [EAST] Emergency Struggle Session-War on Iran w/Nina and Navid Farnia
entry.summary:
Adnan is joined by Nina and Navid Farnia, members of the Anti-Imperialist Scholars Collective, to talk about the illegal imperialist US-Israeli-Western war launched against Iran. Please avail yourselves of the playlist Iran: History and Politics on this channel. We will be focusing on current developments but that background is always relevant and important in analyzing contemporary conditions.
Read Nina and Navid Farnia's interview on Pambazuka News for some background and insight from their excellent analysis: https://www.pambazuka.org/Iran-vs-US-Imperialism
Support the show on Patreon or Substack, if you can (and get early access to episodes)! www.patreon.com/adnanhusain https://www.adnanahusain.substack.com Or make a one-time donation to the show and Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/adnanhusain Like, subscribe, share! Also available as audio podcast on all major platforms: https://adnanhusainshow.libsyn.com X: @adnanahusain Substack: adnanahusain.substack.com www.adnanhusain.org
🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5595083013226496

entry.title: [EAST] Tankie Group Therapy - Tie me to a missile (again)!
entry.summary: Tankie Group Therapy is back! Lara, Sina, Jay, and Adnan get together to talk about the latest aggression on Iran.
entry.content: Tankie Group Therapy is back! Lara, Sina, Jay, and Adnan get together to talk about the latest aggression on Iran.

entry.title: [EAST] Office Hours 23-The Treason of the Clerics w/Justin Podur
entry.summary:
The intellectuals and intelligentsias, like Noam Chomsky, have been exposed as much as any of the corporate and political elites in the Epstein revelations. What is the role of "the intellectuals"? The "Treason of the Clerics" comes from Julian Benda's bemoaning of collaborationist intellectuals, the clerics, of society who betray their sacred duty of dispassionate critique. As we know, even that is a mirage in what Gabriel Rockhill calls the Intellectual World War. Who are the intellectuals of practice, the organic and oppositional leaders, in the struggle for liberation instead? Joining me to talk about this as well as the stifling of Cuba, threats on Iran, and other theatres of US empire is Justin Podur, a professor at York University, author of several important books analyzing US empire, and host of the indispensible Anti-Empire Project and corollary Anti-Genocide Project podcasts and video. Office Hours comes at an early afternoon time, 1pmET Friday Feb 13th so don't miss it!
Support the show on Patreon if you can (and get early access to episodes)! www.patreon.com/adnanhusain Or make a one-time donation to the show and Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/adnanhusain Like, subscribe, share! Also available as audio podcast on all major platforms: https://adnanhusainshow.libsyn.com X: @adnanahusain Substack: adnanahusain.substack.com www.adnanhusain.org
🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5595083013226496
entry.content:
The intellectuals and intelligentsias, like Noam Chomsky, have been exposed as much as any of the corporate and political elites in the Epstein revelations. What is the role of "the intellectuals"? The "Treason of the Clerics" comes from Julian Benda's bemoaning of collaborationist intellectuals, the clerics, of society who betray their sacred duty of dispassionate critique. As we know, even that is a mirage in what Gabriel Rockhill calls the Intellectual World War. Who are the intellectuals of practice, the organic and oppositional leaders, in the struggle for liberation instead? Joining me to talk about this as well as the stifling of Cuba, threats on Iran, and other theatres of US empire is Justin Podur, a professor at York University, author of several important books analyzing US empire, and host of the indispensible Anti-Empire Project and corollary Anti-Genocide Project podcasts and video. Office Hours comes at an early afternoon time, 1pmET Friday Feb 13th so don't miss it!

entry.title: [EAST] Office Hours 20-Iran: Strategic Patience vs. Preemptive Strike w/Ali Alizadeh
entry.summary:
Emergency Office Hours Iran livestream, the first of a major double episode on Iran, Monday, Feb 2nd at 11amET w/Jedaal host and Iran analyst Ali Alizadeh. On the cusp of a possible US attack on Iran in its continuing sanctions, threats, destabilization, and war against the Islamic Republic, we'll discuss the political and geopolitical dimensions with an expert guest. Join us and post your questions and comments.
Support the show on Patreon if you can (and get early access to episodes)! www.patreon.com/adnanhusain Or make a one-time donation to the show and Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/adnanhusain Like, subscribe, share! Also available as audio podcast on all major platforms: https://adnanhusainshow.libsyn.com X: @adnanahusain Substack: adnanahusain.substack.com www.adnanhusain.org
🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5595083013226496
entry.content:
Emergency Office Hours Iran livestream, the first of a major double episode on Iran, Monday, Feb 2nd at 11amET w/Jedaal host and Iran analyst Ali Alizadeh. On the cusp of a possible US attack on Iran in its continuing sanctions, threats, destabilization, and war against the Islamic Republic, we'll discuss the political and geopolitical dimensions with an expert guest. Join us and post your questions and comments.

Support the show on Patreon if you can (and get early access to episodes)!
www.patreon.com/adnanhusain
Or make a one-time donation to the show and Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/adnanhusain
Like, subscribe, share!
Also available as audio podcast on all major platforms:
https://adnanhusainshow.libsyn.com
X: @adnanahusain
Substack: adnanahusain.substack.com
www.adnanhusain.org

🎙️ New to streaming or looking to level up? Check out StreamYard and get $10 discount! 😍 https://streamyard.com/pal/d/5595083013226496

entry.title: [EAST] Tankie Group Therapy LIVE!
entry.summary: The comrades are coming together for the first ever LIVE Tankie Group Therapy to officially launch Psychic Militancy and to process, well, every f-ing thing that has been happening so that we don't have to do it alone. Join us for some much needed comrade therapy.
entry.content: The comrades are coming together for the first ever LIVE Tankie Group Therapy to officially launch Psychic Militancy and to process, well, every f-ing thing that has been happening so that we don't have to do it alone. Join us for some much needed comrade therapy.

entry.title: [EAST] IN SESSION #1 - Venezuela, Empire & the imperative for psychic militancy w/ Geo Maher and Alex Aviña
entry.summary: This will be our first live stream, fittingly for the urgent times, with comrades Geo Maher and Alex Aviña. We will be addressing the most recent fascistic display of empire in Venezuela, listening to their analysis (some of the most precise and my personal favorite out there!), and importantly, unpacking the psychological warfare that is at the heart of this aggression and how we stay focused and committed to our revolutionary struggles.
entry.content: This will be our first live stream, fittingly for the urgent times, with comrades Geo Maher and Alex Aviña. We will be addressing the most recent fascistic display of empire in Venezuela, listening to their analysis (some of the most precise and my personal favorite out there!), and importantly, unpacking the psychological warfare that is at the heart of this aggression and how we stay focused and committed to our revolutionary struggles.

entry.title: [EAST] Showing up for Refaat Alareer’s Family in Gaza: A Fundraiser with Special Guests
entry.summary:
Two years after the assassination of Palestinian martyr Dr. Refaat Alareer his legacy and written work continue to make a profound impact on the movement for Palestinian liberation and self-determination globally, with a particular emphasis on the plight of Palestinian people in Gaza, where Dr. Alareer was an English professor who influenced thousands of Palestinian writers and intellectuals.
https://chuffed.org/project/163752-financial-aid-for-refaat-alareers-family
The surviving members of Palestinian martyr Dr. Refaat Alareer, supported by Refaat's brother Adel, have unfortunately had their family fundraiser mismanaged by a sponsor in the US and are out roughly $20,000 as a result. This family means support and it is politically and morally important that we show up for them. There is a new fundraiser set-up by a very responsible and committed individual which will ensure that all funds get to the family: https://chuffed.org/project/163752-fi...
An all-star line-up including Louis Allday (Liberated Texts, Ebb Books), Dr. Jared A. Ball (Black Liberation Media, IMIXWHATILIKE), Renee Johnston (Saturdays With Renee, BLMedia), Sina Rahmani (East is a Podcast), Benji Schoendorff (Resistance is Fertile), and Lara Sheehi (Psychic Militancy) wll join us! Other guests may be announced or join us live!
Come through and hear from some wonderful guests and make a contribution to Refaat's family!
entry.content:
Two years after the assassination of Palestinian martyr Dr. Refaat Alareer his legacy and written work continue to make a profound impact on the movement for Palestinian liberation and self-determination globally, with a particular emphasis on the plight of Palestinian people in Gaza, where Dr. Alareer was an English professor who influenced thousands of Palestinian writers and intellectuals.

https://chuffed.org/project/163752-financial-aid-for-refaat-alareers-family


The surviving members of Palestinian martyr Dr. Refaat Alareer, supported by Refaat's brother Adel, have unfortunately had their family fundraiser mismanaged by a sponsor in the US and are out roughly $20,000 as a result. This family means support and it is politically and morally important that we show up for them. There is a new fundraiser set-up by a very responsible and committed individual which will ensure that all funds get to the family: https://chuffed.org/project/163752-fi...

An all-star line-up including Louis Allday (Liberated Texts, Ebb Books), Dr. Jared A. Ball (Black Liberation Media, IMIXWHATILIKE), Renee Johnston (Saturdays With Renee, BLMedia), Sina Rahmani (East is a Podcast), Benji Schoendorff (Resistance is Fertile), and Lara Sheehi (Psychic Militancy) wll join us! Other guests may be announced or join us live!

Come through and hear from some wonderful guests and make a contribution to Refaat's family!

entry.title: [EAST] Red Scare w/ Gabriel Rockhill 📱
entry.summary:
Join NIck Estes live in conversation with Gabriel Rockhil on his new book, Who Paid the Pipers of Western Marxism? (2025)
Make sure you follow Nick's SubStack nickestes.substack.com
entry.content:
Join NIck Estes live in conversation with Gabriel Rockhil on his new book, Who Paid the Pipers of Western Marxism? (2025)

Make sure you follow Nick's SubStack
